reviews.comment:
Una ACA integrada al paisaje de su entorno! Guarda el estilo pristino del lugar! 5% descuento en nafta para socios del acá, y descuentos por pago con app YPF!

(Translated by Google)
An ACA integrated into its surroundings! Preserving the pristine style of the place! 5% discount on gasoline for ACA members, and discounts for payments with the YPF app!

reviews.comment:
Felicito el mantenimiento. Una de las pocas estaciones acá que se mantiene casi original! Hermoso el lugar donde está además.

(Translated by Google)
I commend the upkeep. It's one of the few stations here that's been kept almost in its original state! The location is beautiful too.
